title: syngramma fraxinea
intro: Syngramma fraxinea, also known as the Silver Vine or Actinotroche, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The leaves and stems of this plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Syngramma fraxinea include its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other sleep disorders, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an extract or tincture, and can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
